title: Arke
description: A collection of chests and other containers
body:
## Tall Barrels

Two block tall barrels, they behave similarly to double chests but are more versatile in placement. ![A Barrel and two Tall Barrels on the edge of a jungle.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cGgMT4Fy/images/3f5c8f7bc3782a5773a3d5759d31fe9b9cfdaa1f.png)

## Classic Chests

Chests that occupy a full block space. They otherwise behave identically to vanilla chests. ![A single and double Classic Chest in a spruce tundra.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cGgMT4Fy/images/db71139bc88d6fb390733da8fdc8094ceef0862d.png)

## Purpur Shulker Boxes

A simple retexture of vanilla shulker boxes. ![A Purpur Shulker Box in the end on the main island.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cGgMT4Fy/images/a876064e5282a83dc61e911363c9700d6223b23b.png)

## Mini Chests

A smaller chest the size of a player head, only stores 1 stack; useful for automation and makes a nice head accessory too. ![A Mini Chest in a spruce tundra.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cGgMT4Fy/images/2871cf7844aceeb8a7b7e8d46f518ae2fbc67fb0.png)

## Wooden Chest variants

Identical to vanilla chests but with unique textures. ![On top of a small hill, a Dark Oak, a Spruce, and an Oak Large Chest.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cGgMT4Fy/images/076ae317e4f48d0e5fcafebe140bb83cfea42faa.png)


## Shadow UI
This is a new UI style I've been working on.

I will eventually edit vanilla GUIs in this resource pack but for now it's just for my blocks.
![Shadow UI and the more traditionally Vanilla-ish UI for the Shulker Box inventory; both mimic the style of an open Shulker Box but the Shadow UI is more flat and squared off.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cGgMT4Fy/images/838e4c6e0cba2dd59f00e6bf8127716b2736dae4.png)
***

…and more features coming soon™
